options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the .csproj file. If omitted, will search one in current directory.

options.name: --configuration
options.description: Project configuration to resolve output assembly. [default: Debug]

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Path to the .NET assembly to discover source types. If set, will override the --project option.

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to the directory where to store generated TypeScript files.

options.name: --strategy
options.description: The way to discovery POCO types [default: Auto]

options.name: --arrange
options.description: How the generated TypeScript modules should be arranged. [default: Explicit]

options.name: --file-name
options.description: Default file name for Explicit or Single arrangement.

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Generate TypeScript code with namespaces.

options.name: --discoverer
options.description: Full CLR name of type to use for discovering POCO types.

options.name: --camel-case
options.description: Use camel-case for type members.

options.name: --date
options.description: How date types be mapped. [default: String]

options.name: --enum
options.description: How enum types be mapped. [default: Number]

options.name: --no-nullable
options.description: Disable nullables

options.name: --mapping
options.description: Path to the type mapping file

options.name: --compact
options.description: Compact output file by eliminating blank lines.

options.name: --double-quote
options.description: Use double-quote for string literals.

options.name: --indent-size
options.description: Indent size, will ignored when using tab indent. [default: 4]

options.name: --tab-indent
options.description: Use \t instead of spaces.

options.name: --semicolon
options.description: Add semicolons if necessary.

options.name: --header
options.description: Path to a file which you want its content been embeded into top of each output file.

options.name: --footer
options.description: Path to a file which you want its content been embeded into bottom of each output file.

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watches target assembly and update output when changed automatically.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Print generated code on console, do not write any file.

options.name: --silent
options.description: Do not output any information except generated code with --dry-run option set.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
